structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-04-04  HUD Revisions to Residency Requirements
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-04-04 08:48:13-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

As you are aware, HUD issued Mortgagee Letter 2025-09 which will prohibit funding an FHA loan for Non-Permanent Resident Aliens.  This change is effective immediately OR mortgage lenders can wait until May 25, 2025, to implement the new policy.  

 

NOVA has elected to implement the change on May 25, 2025.  Pipeline reports have been run and there are currently six FHA loans at various milestones that could be affected.  Loan Officers will receive a message from Ryan Whalen with file information.  If the Non-Permanent Resident Alien borrower wishes to continue with an FHA loan, a case number must be assigned by May 24, 2025.  

 

The ML allows no exceptions to this date.

 

We anticipate that the GSE’s (Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac) may soon issue the same policy change.  Currently there are 77 conventional loan files in progress where the borrower or co-borrower are Non-Permanent Resident Aliens.  67 of these loans are at the “started” milestone.  The pipeline report has been shared with Ryan Whalen, and he will be contacting each Loan Officer who may be affected.

 

Attachments

*	HUD Mortgagee Letter 2025-09

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
